metadata.description: Golden dataset for RAG quality testing - 1000 Q&A pairs across 10 popular board games (template-generated for alpha testing) + 20 expert-annotated Terraforming Mars Q&A (BGAI-056) + 15 expert-annotated Wingspan Q&A (BGAI-057) + 15 expert-annotated Azul Q&A (BGAI-058)
